mapper.select: SELECT * FROM dorm_building WHERE building_id = #{buildingId} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT * FROM dorm_building
is_deleted = 0
AND building_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{buildingNo}, '%')
AND building_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{buildingName}, '%')
AND area = #{area}
AND manager_id = #{managerId}
ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM dorm_building WHERE manager_id = #{managerId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dorm_building (building_no, building_name, floor_count, area, manager_id, remark) VALUES (#{buildingNo}, #{buildingName}, #{floorCount}, #{area}, #{managerId}, #{remark})
mapper.update:
UPDATE dorm_building
building_no = #{buildingNo}, building_name = #{buildingName}, floor_count = #{floorCount}, area = #{area}, manager_id = #{managerId}, remark = #{remark},
WHERE building_id = #{buildingId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dorm_room WHERE building_id = #{buildingId} AND is_deleted = 0
